programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Lines in the Sand: The thirteen remaining cowboys face their first immunity challenge that tests their individual skills. The contestants race to score the fastest time in barrel racing and calf roping. While most cowboys impress Trace and the judges, only one will be safe from the next elimination. For the team challenge, the cowboys take on a group of untrained horses that they have to break, saddle, and ride. In the end, it all comes down to strategy, and the team that thinks ahead takes the win. After a few choice words, teammates lock horns, determined to out-cowboy the other. When an unexpected cowboy heads home, the rest of the contestants realize every move they make counts in this competition.

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: A timber baron plans to take advantage of a new law and make millions. Making his money turns out to be harder than he ever thought when the Quakers who own the land refuse to sell their precious trees.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Cast Iron Skillets, Baskets, Axes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Madison, Wisconsin, Jill makes sparks fly with Alisa Toninato, making cast iron skillets in the shape of the 50 states. In Ashley Falls, Massachusetts, JoAnn Catsos is one of only two people in the country to earn a degree in basket making. Joann shows Jill her octofoil basket, a pattern she invented. Finally, in Fairview, Tennessee, Jill meets Anthony Martin, who uses pre-Revolutionary War tools and techniques from the 1600s to craft one of man's oldest tools.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - South Dakota: Entertainer Taylor Hicks tastes his way across South Dakota on a quest to assemble a plate of the state's most monumental foods. First, he visits a sheep farm where they produce flavorful meat for chislic, a cubed meat dish. Next, he heads to a bison ranch to learn how to herd bison, and he scouts roadside ditches in search of wild asparagus. Then, he learns how to make two of the state's popular desserts: a Native American berry dish called “wojapi” and a German inspired pastry called “kuchen.” It's a heaping helping of the Mount Rushmore State's most delicious foods.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Go Big or Go Broker: Tough jobs and shady business deals force the cowboys to work smarter, not harder. A local rancher asks the guys to remove an ornery bull from his property, but this one is as bullheaded as they come—and takes longer than expected. Tired of scrapping for day wages, the cowboys decide to put their hard-earned experience to use: instead of working cattle for others, they'll start brokering herds themselves. After sifting through his grandmother's old photos, Booger reconnects with his past, then looks to the future by passing on “the cowboy way” to four-year-old Matthew. While Bubba confides in Kaley that the cowboys are reevaluating their business, Cody gets bad news about his upcoming rodeo, which is even worse news for his bank account.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Real Lone Star Ranger: When young Texas Ranger Ira Aten is having trouble hunting down a ruthless outlaw, he enlists the help of John Hughes, an aloof rancher with an uncanny talent for tracking bad guys. The two men form an unlikely and unexpected bond while traversing the dusty path toward justice. With Hughes' guidance, Aten finally catches up to the outlaw and ends his reign of terror. Along the way, Hughes decides to become a Ranger himself and transforms from loner to lawman. Hughes' adventure with Aten is just the first chapter of a storied career that inspires the popular novel, The Lone Star Ranger. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Aten years later to uncover the real story of the Lone Star Ranger and separate the truth from the fiction.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Bass Reeves: Trailblazing Lawman: After escaping the bonds of slavery, Bass Reeves takes refuge among the indigenous people of The Indian Territory, where he is welcomed into their culture. When the Civil War ends, his new-found tracking skills and fluency in native languages lead to his appointment as the first Black Deputy U.S. Marshal west of the Mississippi River. Though he faces discrimination from his peers, Reeves earns their respect when he accepts Judge Isaac Parker's daunting order to hunt down one of the most ruthless killers in The Indian Territory and bring him back dead or alive. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Judge Parker to learn more about the amazing career of Bass Reeves, who goes on to arrest 3,000 felons, kill 14 men in self-defense, and complete 32 years of service without being wounded.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Down and Dirty: With nine cowboys remaining, the competition gets fierce. First, an old-fashioned horse race turns into an all-out brawl. Then, a cowboy is rushed to the hospital after a freak accident. Host Trace Adkins and the judges send another cowboy home.

programme.sub-title: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats
programme.desc: For DIRT's first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It's all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT's past adventures.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends
programme.desc: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska's abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There'll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest 'shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "Is Atlanta the NEW Food Capital of the South? | Farm-to-Table Feasts
programme.desc: Atlanta is a city famous for vibrant art and tasty food, so for this episode the DIRT team went looking for the real people behind the scenes working to make this city so special. Josh meets celebrated chefs, barbers, farmers, and even a butter-wrapping machine dubbed André 4000 because he's "the second best 'wrapper' in Atlanta"—though special guest Killer Mike would probably take issue with that. Thirty years ago the real André announced to the world "the South got something to say," so tune in and listen up.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.desc: Join the cute and cheeky Buster, as he rides into adventures both big and small with his friends!

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Dive In
programme.desc: Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. The Friends each try to help, with disastrous results. Working summer jobs at the new Heartlake City Pool, Restaurant and Sports Center is fun and games for the Friends – until singing mermaid Andrea gets her very first teenage crush. He's Tad, the new lifeguard, and just the sight of him reduces the normally fearless Andrea to a babbling wimp. The Friends all try to help her out, with less-than stellar results, each attempt resulting in increasing mayhem for Tad until he's terrified of Andrea. Then Andrea discovers that she's been mooning over the wrong boy all along!

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: I Told You So
programme.desc: Confined to a wheelchair after a failed Halloween attempt to prove herself a reporter, What's At Heart photographer Emma sees strange goings-on through her hospital window. She's convinced the neighbors are jewel thieves, but no one believes her – till the bad guys come after her! To show her Friends on the What's At Heart school paper that she's more than just a photographer, Emma investigates a scary old house on Halloween eve -- only to take a tumble and land in the hospital. There, confined to a wheelchair, she observes mysterious goings-on through her window which convince her that the neighbors are jewel thieves. Her friends, though dubious, agree to check it out. But after nearly getting caught by the neighbors, they come up empty and decide it's all just Emma's imagination. Meanwhile, up in Maternity, Sophie's having a baby! The girls run out, leaving Emma alone. And that's when the bad guys decide to pay Emma a visit…

programme.title: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When Garmadon travels back in time in order to undo the past and rid the Ninja from the future, the Ninja follow him and try to stop him by using the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon. In his most villainous attempt at using the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates a vortex through space and time to return to the moment Wu first arrives to recruit Kai to become a ninja (Episode 1, 2011) in order to rid the ninja from the future. The Ninja follow him back in time, only to make the mistake in saving Nya from the Skeletons. Suddenly, Past Kai doesn't have a need to become a ninja, so our current day heroes must fix the past to save their futures. The stakes rise as Garmadon catches wind the Ninja have followed him back in time and plans a dangerous trap. In a final battle, the ninja use the Golden Weapons from the past to clash against Garmadon's Mega-Weapon, causing all of the legendary weapons to shoot off into the night sky. In the end, our heroes return back to the present and learn the Mega-Weapon has ceased to exist because it was destroyed in the past, leaving them all without their elemental powers.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Stone Army
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers. Lord Garmadon struggles controlling the Serpentine now that he is without the Mega-Weapon. His latest endeavor is to lead the snakes in search of a fabled Dark Island that ancient texts say holds dark powers. Unable to find the island, the furious Serpentine abandon Lord Garmadon out at sea. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are called to the museum to find the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has seeped into the ground beneath the city, and it's brought an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior to life! Our heroes come across Misako, Lloyd's long lost mother. She's an archeologist in search of stopping the prophesized battle between Lloyd and his father. She had unearthed the Stone Warrior, and shares how it was once part of an indestructible army created by a dark spirit named The Overlord. When the balance is altered and evil is let into Ninjago, it will allow the Overlord to return and bring darkness and destruction to the land. Unable to destroy the Terminator-like Stone Warrior, the Ninja cleverly trap it. In the end, Lord Garmadon awakens on a small island at sea and hears the voice of the banished Overlord, promising him his wildest dreams. Garmadon uses his four hands to activate a mechanism, raising a lost land from out of the sea, creating a Yin/Yang symbol with Ninjago. The ultimate battle between good and evil begins to unfold.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws The Dinopaws are hungry/Gwen, Bob and Tony bounce very high from some mushrooms and get stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws Bob wants excitement!/The Dinopaws come over the hill wondering what makes them - them?

programme.title: Dinopaws
programme.desc: Dinopaws The gang meet a new Dinopaw who joins their game of tag/Gwen and Tony try and help Bon who is stuck up a tree.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about William the Conqueror, starring Kevin Eldon.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers Mary Queen of Scots' journey from childhood to becoming Elizabeth I's public enemy no 1.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers Follow Napoleon as he rises from humble beginnings to become the Emperor of France.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about King Henry VIII, starring Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about the great Egyptian Queen Cleopatra, starring Kathryn Drysdale.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about King George III, starring Simon Farnaby.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special about the great British Queen Boudica, starring Lorna Watson.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about Winston Churchill, starring Jim Howick.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about Queen Victoria, starring Sarah Hadland.

programme.title: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers
programme.desc: Horrible Histories: Rotten Rulers A special episode about 'Orrible Oliver Cromwell, starring Lawry Lewin.

programme.title: The Berry Best Taste Test
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball. A madcap chase ensues as Apple tries to stop the airmail postal bees from delivering the cake.

programme.title: Foods that Smell
programme.desc: Lily and Avery follow their noses to find out what gives foods their amazing aromas. Avery enjoys a super garlicky Caesar salad, and then tries to sniff out a cure for his ghastly garlic breath. Lily makes a splash at the fish market where she gets to the bottom of seafood's suspicious smells. Together, they take on the ultimate olfactory challenge: recreating Matt's Amazing Seafood Chowder, by sense of smell alone!

programme.title: Foods that Melt
programme.desc: Watch foods melt before your eyes! Chill out as Lily tries to solve the mystery behind Baked Alaska, a frozen dessert that doesn't melt in the oven. Onthe hunt for a simple snack, Avery visits a local cheese shop and discovers there's moreto cheese than just cheddar! Back at the kitchen with Matt, Lily and Avery use a varietyof cheeses and fresh veggiesto see who can make thebest twist on an ooey-gooey melted favourite: grilled cheese sandwiches!

programme.title: Neutralized
programme.desc: Without his Cyberse cards, Yusaku can only barely hold back Revolver's relentless attack. Summoning his new ace monster, Revolver recounts the origin of Ai and his mission to wipe out all Cyberse from the world.

programme.title: Link the Circuit
programme.desc: Yusaku and Revolver keep fighting using the strength of their ace monsters. Despite the odds against him, Yusaku recounts the incident that brought him to this point and steadies his resolve.

programme.title: Blippi's Summer Sleepover at the Zoo
programme.desc: Come along with Blippi for a camp out with jungle animals.

programme.title: The Berry Best Biscuit
programme.desc: Sour teasing Apple escalates into a "prank war" between the two of them. After the girls' feud disrupts the town, they are sentenced in a Berry Bitty City-style trial to camp alone together for a whole weekend. Miraculously, they emerge best buds, and their friends are relieved, until Sour's influence on Apple turns her into a mini-Sour, and they have to do a personality "makeover" on Apple.

programme.title: Hot Sauce Cook Off
programme.desc: Berrykin Bloom's braggart cousin, Berrykin Bertram, has won the hot sauce competition at the local county fair year after year. But this year, Sour and Apple are determined to help the kindhearted Bloom win... whether he wants to or not!

programme.title: The Secret Of Alfea -Winx Club
programme.desc: The Fairy Animals arrive to save Flora and the Winx, magically appearing in the Adamantine MiniWorld. For the Winx there is no time to waste, because, in the meantime, the Ultimate Power Diamond has flown out of the MiniWorld, looking for a keeper… and it has been taken by Kalshara first and then by Brafilius, who has absorbed it, summoning the most powerful magic animals in all the dimensions. In doing so, he has also freed the Trix, who easily turn Brafilius into a dog and force Kalshara to flee. Stronger than ever, the Trix use the Ultimate Power to besiege Alfea. Therefore, the Winx have to enter the Alfea MiniWorld to strengthen the magic source of the college, but on their way they bump once again into the Trix, who throw that fairy place into the dark…

programme.title: The Golden Butterfly -Winx Club
programme.desc: As outside of Alfea the fight between the Trix and the Alfea's fairies goes on, the Winx use their Stones of Memories to go back to Alfea in the past. The Winx meet Mavilla and young Faragonda, asking them to help them finding the Golden Butterfly, the only animal that can give light and energy again to the Heart of Alfea. Thanks to the Tynix power, the Winx enter the Flower MiniWorld bumping into the Trix, on the back of their magic animals: now, with the Ultimate Power in their hands, they can travel to any place linked to the Fairy Animals. To protect the Golden Fairy, Bloom is taken by surprise by Icy, who fires a magic blow against her to make her fall into an ice trap…

programme.title: Tall Tale Trio
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire by making up three outrageous, hysterical accounts of what held them up.

programme.title: Berry Big Tale-Teller
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story. Sweet is thrilled when everyone applauds her, even Sour, who is impressed by her contribution and proud of her sister.

programme.title: Foods that start with Q
programme.desc: Can you name a food that starts with Q? Avery makes Quiche with Chef Jean-Jacques Texier. Lily visits a sheep farm to find out about a creamy, little known cheese called Quark. Back in the kitchen, they take on Matt's Quirky Quesadilla challenge.

programme.title: Foods for The Brain
programme.desc: Lily knows the smartest way to start the day is with a good breakfast, and meets Chef Donna Dooher to make Green Eggs and Ham. Avery visits a centre that researches fish. Matt keeps score as the two face-off with blueberry and strawberry deserts that help build brain power.

programme.title: The Itchy Tag
programme.desc: At school, Sid and his friends explore and learn about the different textures around them: smooth, soft, bumpy and itchy...like his shirt tag!

programme.title: Human Nature
programme.desc: Human Nature, the first talk show where distinguished representatives of the animal kingdom share their wisdom to convey values and lessons to their favorite people: kids.

programme.title: Naughty Nuts
programme.desc: Nut City, a troublesome cartoon place to live, where major mayhem occurs. It was once a spectacular city full of kids and family, but now isolated due to a surge in crime.

programme.title: Lellobee City Farm: The Growing Song / Bingo / Ella Ella Yes Mailman / Rain Rain Go Away / Painting the Barn Song
programme.desc: Let's celebrate everything that grows with the Growing Song! Have you ever noticed that everything is changing? Watch the different seasons of the year and revisit plants, animals, children, and buildings in the farm and city to see how they've grown. / Let's welcome our new farm friend Bingo the cat! A stray cat called Bingo is found by Ella and Mei outside of the farm. Mei calls the animal rescue center who sends Sami the Vet to check the cat over. Ella and Mei adopt Bingo and invite her to live on the farm. It's great to make new friends! / Mailman Marcus is delivering mail to Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Rishi and Izzy are all excited to see what deliveries he has for them - Ella gets a camera, Risihi gets a ball and Izzy gets a brand new plush toy! Just as Mei thinks that she doesn't have any mail, she gets a photo delivered by a drone. / Ella meets Frogalina (a frog ballerina) who shows her how to enjoy the rain with some splashy ballet dance moves. Inspired, Ella shows Go-Go the cat and Pablo the pig that rain is important, and fun, on Lellobee Farm. / The Boogie Barn needs a new coat of paint. The children and animals all want to help. Mei brings them the paint and they all have fun adding paint and mixing paint to create a multi-coloured Boogie Barn!

programme.title: Arthur: Take a Hike, Molly
programme.desc: When the tough customers go on a hike in the woods, Molly makes a few mistakes and must apologize but she refuses to!

programme.title: Mr. Mender and the Chummyjiggers: Toys on Tracks
programme.desc: Ducky Lucky is not very happy with the toy blockage on the tracks. Luckily the Chummies come to the rescue.

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee: Apples & Bananas / Down By The Bay
programme.desc: Tobee and Caitie have tons of fun challenging each other with tongue twisters. Caitie teaches Tobee a song called "Apples and Bananas!" Silly sounds can be so fun! / Tobee has a song to teach Caitie! It's called "Down by the Bay" Caitie loves the song, and afterwards has a big surprise for Tobee.

programme.title: Steve And Maggie: The Wheels on the Bus
programme.sub-title: What's Coming? / The Amazing, Invisible Steve!
programme.desc: Sing along with Steve to the classic 'Wheels on the Bus'. But this time let's ride a car, a train, and more! / Steve is playing in the park. But where is he? Look, there he is, or at least his head is. But where are his hands, his feet, his legs? Help Steve find all his body parts and put himself back together.

programme.title: Angelina Ballerina: Angelina and the Carnival
programme.desc: When Marco feels nostalgic about the annual Costa Mousa Carnival, Viki decides to surprise him by bringing the Carnival to Chipping Cheddar. - Ms Mimi gives the class assignment of finding a prop to help them increase their fitness levels.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach: The Trophy Mystery
programme.desc: While the cadets are supposed to be supervising young Phillipa, Frizzy borrows the lifeguards' Golden Crabby award. But when a cheeky crab makes the shell-shaped trophy her new home and scurries off, the cadets turn into detectives to try and track it down – forgetting to pay attention to Phillipa and her toddler adventures!

programme.title: Heroes of Goo Jit Zu: Gooing Under
programme.desc: Thrash is venturing into the ocean to find the source of those strange deep sea Goo signals. The ocean in this area seems to have a Goo-ish green glow that enters Thrash's body and activates his Deep Goo Sea Goo-volution. As he dives deeper, an entire undersea civilization appears in front of him! Temple-like buildings, cobblestone streets, and a magnificent statue of KING HYDRA!

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Fran's Fruit Truck / Sparky's Spaceship
programme.desc: Fran is pushing a cart full of fruit salad into her truck when the cart flips over and the salad spills all over her delivery truck! It's off to Carl's Car Wash! At the car wash, Carl inspects her vehicle and decides she's a little messy and her wash only requires 3 tokens. Fran heads into the car wash and drives out as shiny as the apple she hands Carl! / Sparky the alien is on his way to Quasar's Market when he takes a joyride through the goopy rings around Saturn. Unfortunately, the rings get space goo all over his spaceship, so Sparky zoogles Carl on the intergalactic web and zooms right down. After Carl's mess assessment, Sparky pays two tokens and gets all spic and span. Sparky is ecstatic that Carl cleaned up this out-of-this-world mess!

programme.title: Road Rangers: Who Are You Going To Call / Sawyer's Folly / Road Ranger had a Farm
programme.desc: Whenever there is any trouble that one can't handle, the Road Rangers be come the savior. They team up to control and manage the critical situations around the car cartoon town. Have fun while watching this super cool cartoon show for kids./ Sawyer, the tow truck, is on a holiday watch how he enjoys his holiday while the rest of his friends work. Instead of helping his friends in need he continuous to enjoy his mini vacation. Enjoy as Sawyer learns a huge lesson on being selfish. / It's so interesting to know that Road Rangers too had a farm with so many cute animals around. Watch this lovely animal song for kids and babies and have a wonderful time singing along to our version of the old classic kids songs like Abc, numbers, colors, shapes, phonics and more with their favorite friends.

programme.title: My Little Pony Friendship is Magic: Wonderbolts Academy
programme.desc: Rainbow Dash receives an invitation to attend the Wonderbolt Academy, but questions whether she is Wonderbolt material.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.desc: When Mr. Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling, he ends up trapped in a canyon. The Paw Patrol has to hurry to save him.

programme.title: Danny Go! Dance Songs: Pigs on the Loose! Farm Animal Adventure / Ka-Pow! Superhero Dance / “In the Mood for Food!” Cooking Dance
programme.desc: Are you ready for an unforgettable FARM ANIMAL adventure?? Dance along with Danny as he runs, jumps, and gallops across the farm to catch Penny the purple chicken before she lays her golden eggs! Oh, but watch out for those crazy pigs! If they get loose, you gotta get off the floor fast! / Are you ready to be a SUPERHERO? Dance along with Danny and his friends as they pretend they have amazing powers like super strength, invisibility, laser eyes and more! Oh, but when your powers run out, you better follow the dance moves to charge back up! / Are you feeling HUNGRY?? Time to do some cooking in the kitchen! Dance along with Danny Go and his friends as they mash potatoes, chop carrots, crack eggs, mix cake batter and more!

programme.title: Zak Jinks: The Hidden Truth / Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: After reading a magazine, Zak is terrified that aliens are living disguised among the human population. / Zak accidentally breaks his sister's "Teeny Weeny Bunny" DVD. Zak has a great idea to re-record

programme.title: Cloudbabies: Stranded
programme.desc: Baba Blue sets out to find an ingredient for Moon's cake but gets distracted by a cloud.

Therefore he drives to the city and goes to a restaurant to order his favorite food.

programme.title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe: Blue Shell Challenge by Abdallah Smash: Koopa Troopa in the Leaf Cup! / Dodging Blues With Shy Guy! / Lakitu Competes in the Triforce Cup!
programme.desc: Abdallah plays as a new character, Koopa Troopa, to races through all 4 levels of the Leaf Cup and sets out to dodge as many blue shells as possible in episode 9 of Mario Kart 8 Deluxe: Blue Shell Challenge on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly comm... / Abdallah and Shy Guy team up to dodge blue shells in the Lightning Cup in episode 10 of Mario Kart 8 Deluxe: Blue Shell Challenge on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary. / Abdallah plays as Lakitu for the first time in the series and races through the Triforce Cup while strategizing blue shell dodges in episode 11 of Mario Kart 8 Deluxe: Blue Shell Challenge on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry figures he's a sure thing for the school's Coach of the Year award after his team wins the city championship. Callaghan makes a bombshell announcement. Jimmy is finally graduating and Frank is determined to help him find a career.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: After losing his Xavier Academy job last season over the unfortunate Coach Keenan saga, Gerry finds himself subbing at a tough inner city school, miserable and desperate to get his old job back. Meanwhile, the Xavier staff is concerned about Robert, whose attempt to cultivate a cool new laid back image is misconstrued for a nervous breakdown due to his having been overlooked as Principal Callaghan's successor. At the same time, Trudy's patience is tested when Emma's husband Ted decides to hang out for the day while his wife works.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark fears being forced to play the cello will make him a social pariah. But when his cello is taken by a gang of bullies, Fox begrudgingly comes to his rescue. Meanwhile, Pop and Sister Rose take a stroll down memory lane when it's revealed they used to be an item.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When Ritche invites himself to a sleepover, Mark scrambles to hide his family's “eccentric” behaviour. Meanwhile, Mike Sr takes a staunch pro-cucumber stance when the new vegetable buys ad time on VOCM radio.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick throw an open mic night to help promote Rose Apothecary, but when Patrick announces he'll be performing, David gets cold feet. Johnny and Alexis begin re-branding the motel, but Stevie is apprehensive, fearing that they're expanding too quickly. Moira accidentally finds out the gender of the Schitts' baby, and tries desperately to keep it a secret.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira throw a family barbecue with the intention of getting to know Patrick a little bit better, as they believe this to be the longest relationship David has ever had. But David is worried about inflicting his family upon Patrick and tries to keep them apart. Meanwhile, Alexis receives a mysterious text from Ted, and with the help of a new friend, decides to investigate.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After the barbecue fiasco, Stevie takes David to a spa for some much-needed wallowing. Unfortunately, she has chosen a honeymoon package, which just rubs salt in the wound. Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills, but Moira is not fully on board with her husband's new involvement in her social life. Alexis tests out a dating app and goes on a date with a cute local.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David finally returns to work, hoping to get back together with Patrick, but learns that he may have left things too long. Moira discourages Alexis from pitching a singles night event at Town Hall, then accidentally finds herself pitching the idea as her own. Johnny buys Stevie a thank you gift for all of Stevie's hard work at the motel, but Stevie takes it the wrong way.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate intuits Anne's “cry for help” and takes her friend on an important reconnaissance mission. Meanwhile, Jenny reaches the peak of her self-exploration and is left longing for the way things used to be. But after Ian makes a startling discovery, she may be too late. Frankie picks up a curious new hobby when Giselle steps up to become the working parent.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate arrives in Montreal and finally meets her longtime “working mom” role model and mentor Victoria Stromanger. When the real Victoria doesn't totally line up with the version Kate had long admired, Kate's left wondering about the true cost of “having it all." Meanwhile, Anne makes a major decision with the love and support of her husband Lionel. And Jenny attempts to return to her old life with Ian, by bringing back some things he'd rather leave in the past, while Frankie's new hobby leads to disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: It's game day for Kate: the biggest presentation of her career. This make-or-break opportunity unfortunately collides with a crisis at home. Now Kate is faced with the ultimate choice: career or motherhood? Meanwhile, Anne's family is united through Alice's school project. Ian calls out Jenny on her erratic behaviour, and forces her to own up to what she really wants. And Frankie attempts to repair the damage she's done to her family and her life.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: The year is 2005 and a young ambitious Kate attends her best friend Anne's wedding, but encounters situations that could change the course of their lives forever.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions. Mike started his stand-up comedy career in 1996 first performing in the local clubs in NYC, then gaining nationwide popularity. He has been on TV shows, independent feature films, and commercials for HP and Modells. Mike has also performed in daytime shows: Rachel Ray, The Chew, and ABC's The Revolution.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: Ty Barnett
programme.desc: Ty Barnett, a Chicago native, got his start at Seattle's Comedy Underground. Whoopi Goldberg called Ty “hilarious” and reviewers have said he is “thought provoking” and “edgy”. All this praise earned him many television appearances. He hosted the Food Network's Mealin' and Dealin', Discovery Family's Babies Behaving Badly and Beasts Behaving Badly, and appeared in over 15 national commercials. It all began when he was one of the two finalists on the most-watched and Emmy nominated season of Last Comic Standing. Ty went on to multiple Tonight Show appearances where Jay Leno called Ty “one of the funniest comedians working”. He also appeared in HBO's Bad Boys of Comedy, his own Comedy Central Presents and one-hour special Issues. Ty was named “one to watch” by the Hollywood Reporter. He's also been seen on the sitcoms Samantha Who, Til Death, Life in Pieces, NickMom Night Out and Tosh.O. His comedy album, Grown Man-Baby Steps is a favorite on Sirius XM.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Tom Simmons: Peace, Love and Whatnot

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: With his Sharp Delivery, quick wit, and unique style, Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982. A Daily performer on The WGN Morning News in Chicago, Mike has appeared in concert with such names as George Carlin, Wayne Newton, Crosby, Stills & Nash, and Reba McIntyre. He has performed on numerous television programs including HBO's U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen Colorado MTV's Half Hour Comedy Hour and A&E's Comedy on the Road. The Chicago Tribune calls Mike, "One of the funniest and most talented performers to ever work in Chicago." For an evening of uncontrollable laughs, Mike Toomey is a sure choice!

programme.title: Chris Rock: One Man Show
programme.desc: This hilarious, unapologetic, hard-working comic with sharp social punchlines hasn't always had it easy. In fact he draws his comedy from a darker side of his past. We look back at the life and rise of the one who was once named the funniest man in America.

programme.title: Hollywood Signs
programme.desc: Hollywood Signs is the documentary that celebrates autograph collecting, collectors, and our obsession with celebrities. It focuses on autograph dealing, the history of the autograph, autograph conventions, celebrities' point of view, and, of course, the folks whose lives revolve around autographs. Hollywood Signs is a love letter to a world with characters you definitely don't see every day.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Procrastination Station
programme.desc: Fascinating ideas for when you should probably be doing something else. 1) How to control someone else's arm with your brain | Greg Gage 2) How webtoons are changing movies and TV | Hyeonmi Kim 3) Da Vinci's Vitruvian Man of math - James Earle 4) Mind-blowing, magnified portraits of insects | Levon Biss 5) The architectural wonder of impermanent cities | Rahul Mehrotra 6) Smelfies, and other experiments in synthetic biology | Ani Liu 7) How do oysters make pearls? | Rob Ulrich

programme.title: Procrastination Station
programme.desc: Fascinating ideas for when you should probably be doing something else. 1) Inside the bizarre world of internet trolls and propagandists | Andrew Marantz 2) Can you outsmart the fallacy that divided a nation? | Elizabeth Cox 3) The informal settlements reshaping the world | Jota Samper 4) Does stress cause pimples? | Claudia Aguirre 5) How bumble bees inspired a network of tiny museums | Amanda Schochet 6) The science of spiciness - Rose Eveleth

programme.title: Afternoon Snack
programme.desc: Fun facts and fascinating information for a super-smart afternoon. 1) Sloths! The strange life of the world's slowest mammal | Lucy Cooke 2) Why you should stop setting goals (yes, really) | Emmanuel Acho 3) What happens when you fall into piranha-infested waters? | Antonio Machado-Allison 4) How the compass unlocked the world | David Biello 5) How daylight saving time affects our bodies, minds -- and world | Matt Walker 6) The trick to regaining your childlike wonder | Zach King 7) Adventures of an asteroid hunter | Carrie Nugent 8) 4 ways the COVID-19 pandemic changed the way we sleep | Matt Walker

programme.title: What in the World?
programme.desc: Perspective-shifting ideas on how to see life on Earth. 1) Can you freeze your body and come back to life? | Shannon N. Tessier 2) How exactly does binary code work? - José Américo N L F Freitas 3) What is Zeno's Dichotomy Paradox? - Colm Kelleher 4) How big is a mole? (Not the animal, the other one.) - Daniel Dulek 5) What on Earth is spin? - Brian Jones 6) If superpowers were real: Invisibility - Joy Lin 7) Is light a particle or a wave? - Colm Kelleher 8) How folding paper can get you to the moon - Adrian Paenza 9) Is there a center of the universe? - Marjee Chmiel and Trevor Owens 10) One is one ... or is it? - Christopher Danielson 11) How simple ideas lead to scientific discoveries - Adam Savage 12) Free falling in outer space - Matt J. Carlson

programme.title: Ocean Wonders
programme.desc: Dive into the unexplored world beneath the waves: the beautiful, fragile (and often mysterious) deeps of the ocean. 1) What's at the bottom of the ocean -- and how we're getting there | Victor Vescovo 2) The wild sex lives of marine creatures | Luka Seamus Wright 3) The discoveries awaiting us in the ocean's twilight zone | Heidi M. Sosik 4) Could you survive the real Twilight Zone? | Philip Renaud and Kenneth Kostel 5) The deep sea's medicinal secrets | Sam Afoullouss 6) The dangers of a noisy ocean -- and how we can quiet it down | Nicola Jones

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas
programme.desc: New, fresh ideas straight from the brightest minds of our time. 1) A comedian's take on how to save democracy | Jordan Klepper 2) How do gas masks actually work? | George Zaidan 3) Is technology our savior — or our slayer? | Ruha Benjamin 4) What it's like to be a parent in a war zone | Aala El-Khani 5) What does "wealth" mean to you? | Aisha Nyandoro

programme.title: How The Brain Works
programme.desc: How does the brain -- a 3-pound snarl of nervous tissue -- create inspired inventions, the feeling of hunger, the experience of beauty, the sense of self? Researchers at the edge of science explain. 1) The brain science (and benefits) of ASMR | Craig Richard 2) How sound can hack your memory while you sleep | Greg Gage 3) What color is Tuesday? Exploring synesthesia - Richard E. Cytowic 4) What is melatonin -- and should you take it to fall asleep? | Matt Walker 5) Why helmets don't prevent concussions -- and what might | David Camarillo 6) This is your brain on air pollution | María Neira
